name: Lead Capture Workflow
description: Captures leads via webhook, maps data, saves to Google Sheets, and summarizes with AI.

nodes.name: HTTP Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Receives incoming POST request with lead data.

nodes.name: Data Mapping
nodes.description: Maps raw payload to standardized lead format.

nodes.name: Google Sheets API
nodes.description: Appends the mapped lead data to a new row in a spreadsheet.

nodes.name: AI Lead Summarization & Scoring
nodes.description: Summarizes the lead message and assigns a Low/Medium/High interest rating.

config.prompt: Analyze the following lead message and provide a brief summary. Assign an interest rating of Low, Medium, or High based on the urgency and content of the message.
